meaning: adj.[医]脊柱前凸的,(某些雌性动物交配时)弓背姿势的
examples: To observe the value of clinical application about a novel cervical traction apparatus that could recover cervical lordotic curvature.
To the cases of jumping multilevel CSM that have a kyphotic deformity, it allows anterior decompression and reconstruction of the spine to help restore a lordotic curvature.
